generated_oml:
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor (I_M) measuring the supply current of the motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataStream
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring the joint angle of the motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData JointAngleDataStream
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder measuring the joint angle of the secondary gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:producedData JointAngleDataStream
]

instance CurrentDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Live current measurement stream from the motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance JointAngleDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Live joint angle measurement stream from the motor/gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance TorqueDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Derived torque measurement stream calculated from current and angle data."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, MotorEncoder
]

instance AngularVelocityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity stream calculated from joint angle data."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance AccelerationDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration stream calculated from joint angle data."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded current data used for simulation and friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataStream
]

instance JointAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded joint angle data used for simulation and state estimation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData JointAngleDataStream
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded torque data derived from motor current and angle for model validation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataStream
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded angular velocity data used for friction model estimation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataStream
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded angular acceleration data used for simulation tuning."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataStream
]

instance MotorOutputTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output trace (ω_M) generated by the motor simulation twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance GearOutputTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gearbox output trace (ω_G) generated by the gearbox simulation twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance SystemOutputTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated system output trace (ω_out) generated by the system simulation twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink enabler for executable simulation models of the rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelUpdaterService, DataAggregationService, SimulationComparisonService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML enabler for structural and behavioral system engineering models of the rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) enabler for linking data to models."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelUpdaterService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT enabler for real‑time one‑way streaming of sensor data from the robot."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard enabler for visualizing measured and simulated outputs of the rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionModelUpdaterService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous identification and updating of friction models (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateFrictionModelAction, SuggestControlFeedForwardAction
]

instance SimulationComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for comparing simulation outputs with measured behavior to validate models."
    DTDFVocab:provides DiscrepancyReportInsight
]

instance DataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for traceable aggregation of data traces from sensors and simulation outputs."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossTrendInsight, DiscrepancyReportInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real‑time dashboard visualization of measured and simulated motor, gearwheel, and system outputs."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossTrendInsight, DiscrepancyReportInsight
]

instance UpdateFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic estimation and updating of friction model parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SuggestControlFeedForwardAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Suggestion to modify robot control feedforward compensation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance FrictionLossTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring of friction loss trends to schedule maintenance."
]

instance DiscrepancyReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provision of discrepancy reports between simulated and measured behavior."
]

instance BaseAxisMotorTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor simulation twin of the first rotary axis of the MABI MAX 100."
]

instance GearSimulationTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel simulation twin of the first rotary axis of the MABI MAX 100."
]

instance GearboxSimulationTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Secondary gearbox simulation twin of the first rotary axis of the MABI MAX 100."
]

instance SystemSimulationTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Overall system simulation twin encompassing motor, gearwheel, and gearbox."
]

instance CentralProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Central processing component orchestrating simulation, data streaming, and friction model refinement."
]

instance SysMLBlockDefinitionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural SysML Block‑Definition diagram of the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural SysML Internal Block diagram of the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral simulation model implemented in MATLAB Simulink for the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑Viscous friction sub‑model used in the simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction sub‑model used in the simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction sub‑model used in the simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction sub‑model used in the simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time operation synchronized with the robot control loop; data streams via MQTT at the control cycle frequency; simulation models run concurrently to provide predictions at the same rate."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized, one‑way data pipeline: PT → MQTT broker → Processing component → Simulation models → Data traces → Dashboard. The DT is composed of the digital shadow, the AAS interface, and the processing / simulation cluster."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the as‑designed (ideal frictionless model), as‑manufactured (mechanical structure via SysML), and as‑operated stages (live data and model updates), and is used throughout the robot’s lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models verified by traceability of data origins and computational paths; continuous identification of friction parameters compensates for wear, temperature, and load variations; comparison of simulation with measured data provides validation; uncertainties arise from sensor noise and model simplifications; real‑time updates mitigate drift."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "One‑way MQTT broker over TCP/IP; robot PLC publishes I_M and angle; DT subscribes; Asset Administration Shells expose AAS interfaces for data linking; communication conforms to IEC 62834 (AAS) and MQTT."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital shadow and processing components are hosted on an industrial edge server (e.g., local PC or cloud instance) with network access to the MQTT broker; visualization dashboard served via web interface."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for system architecture, AAS (IEC 62834) for asset modeling and data linking, MQTT (ISO 20819) for communication, and MathWorks Simulink (ISO/IEC 19971) for simulation models."
]
